account-assignments.description:
Delimiter to be used between ID elements.
Defaults to `-` (hyphen). Set to `""` to use no delimiter at all.
account-assignments.name: delimiter

account-assignments.description:
Limit `id` to this many characters (minimum 6).
Set to `0` for unlimited length.
Set to `null` for keep the existing setting, which defaults to `0`.
Does not affect `id_full`.
account-assignments.name: id_length_limit

account-assignments.description:
Controls the letter case of the `tags` keys (label names) for tags generated by this module.
Does not affect keys of tags passed in via the `tags` input.
Possible values: `lower`, `title`, `upper`.
Default value: `title`.
account-assignments.name: label_key_case

account-assignments.description:
Describe additional descriptors to be output in the `descriptors` output map.
Map of maps. Keys are names of descriptors. Values are maps of the form
`{
   format = string
   labels = list(string)
}`
(Type is `any` so the map values can later be enhanced to provide additional options.)
`format` is a Terraform format string to be passed to the `format()` function.
`labels` is a list of labels, in order, to pass to `format()` function.
Label values will be normalized before being passed to `format()` so they will be
identical to how they appear in `id`.
Default is `{}` (`descriptors` output will be empty).
account-assignments.name: descriptor_formats

account-assignments.description: A list of parameters to use for data resources to depend on. This is a workaround to avoid module depends_on as that will recreate the module resources in many unexpected situations
account-assignments.name: identitystore_group_depends_on

account-assignments.description:
Additional tags (e.g. `{'BusinessUnit': 'XYZ'}`).
Neither the tag keys nor the tag values will be modified by this module.
account-assignments.name: tags

account-assignments.description:
Additional key-value pairs to add to each map in `tags_as_list_of_maps`. Not added to `tags` or `id`.
This is for some rare cases where resources want additional configuration of tags
and therefore take a list of maps with tag key, value, and additional configuration.
account-assignments.name: additional_tag_map

account-assignments.description:
The order in which the labels (ID elements) appear in the `id`.
Defaults to ["namespace", "environment", "stage", "name", "attributes"].
You can omit any of the 6 labels ("tenant" is the 6th), but at least one must be present.
account-assignments.name: label_order

account-assignments.description: ID element. Usually an abbreviation of your organization name, e.g. 'eg' or 'cp', to help ensure generated IDs are globally unique
account-assignments.name: namespace

account-assignments.description: ID element. Usually used for region e.g. 'uw2', 'us-west-2', OR role 'prod', 'staging', 'dev', 'UAT'
account-assignments.name: environment

account-assignments.description:
ID element. Additional attributes (e.g. `workers` or `cluster`) to add to `id`,
in the order they appear in the list. New attributes are appended to the
end of the list. The elements of the list are joined by the `delimiter`
and treated as a single ID element.
account-assignments.name: attributes

account-assignments.description: Account assignments
account-assignments.name: account_assignments
account-assignments.type:
list(object({
    account             = string
    permission_set_name = string
    permission_set_arn  = string
    principal_name      = string
    principal_type      = string
  }))

account-assignments.description:
Map of group display name to Identity Store group ID. When provided, the
submodule resolves GROUP principals from this map directly instead of
using a data source. This avoids a `ResourceNotFoundException` at plan
time when an `account_assignments` entry references a Terraform-managed
group that has not yet been created.

Pass a merged map of all manual + IdP group IDs from the parent module.
Any principal_name in `account_assignments` that is missing from this map
falls back to the data source lookup, preserving the previous behavior.
account-assignments.name: group_ids

account-assignments.default:
{
  "additional_tag_map": {},
  "attributes": [],
  "delimiter": null,
  "descriptor_formats": {},
  "enabled": true,
  "environment": null,
  "id_length_limit": null,
  "label_key_case": null,
  "label_order": [],
  "label_value_case": null,
  "labels_as_tags": [
    "unset"
  ],
  "name": null,
  "namespace": null,
  "regex_replace_chars": null,
  "stage": null,
  "tags": {},
  "tenant": null
}
account-assignments.description:
Single object for setting entire context at once.
See description of individual variables for details.
Leave string and numeric variables as `null` to use default value.
Individual variable settings (non-null) override settings in context object,
except for attributes, tags, and additional_tag_map, which are merged.
account-assignments.name: context

account-assignments.description:
Terraform regular expression (regex) string.
Characters matching the regex will be removed from the ID elements.
If not set, `"/[^a-zA-Z0-9-]/"` is used to remove all characters other than hyphens, letters and digits.
account-assignments.name: regex_replace_chars

account-assignments.description:
Controls the letter case of ID elements (labels) as included in `id`,
set as tag values, and output by this module individually.
Does not affect values of tags passed in via the `tags` input.
Possible values: `lower`, `title`, `upper` and `none` (no transformation).
Set this to `title` and set `delimiter` to `""` to yield Pascal Case IDs.
Default value: `lower`.
account-assignments.name: label_value_case

account-assignments.description:
Set of labels (ID elements) to include as tags in the `tags` output.
Default is to include all labels.
Tags with empty values will not be included in the `tags` output.
Set to `[]` to suppress all generated tags.
**Notes:**
  The value of the `name` tag, if included, will be the `id`, not the `name`.
  Unlike other `null-label` inputs, the initial setting of `labels_as_tags` cannot be
  changed in later chained modules. Attempts to change it will be silently ignored.
account-assignments.name: labels_as_tags

account-assignments.description: Set to false to prevent the module from creating any resources
account-assignments.name: enabled

account-assignments.description: ID element _(Rarely used, not included by default)_. A customer identifier, indicating who this instance of a resource is for
account-assignments.name: tenant

account-assignments.description: ID element. Usually used to indicate role, e.g. 'prod', 'staging', 'source', 'build', 'test', 'deploy', 'release'
account-assignments.name: stage

account-assignments.description:
ID element. Usually the component or solution name, e.g. 'app' or 'jenkins'.
This is the only ID element not also included as a `tag`.
The "name" tag is set to the full `id` string. There is no tag with the value of the `name` input.
account-assignments.name: name

permission-sets.description:

Does not affect keys of tags passed in via the `tags` input.
Possible values: `lower`, `title`, `upper`.
Default value: `title`.
permission-sets.name: label_key_case

permission-sets.description:

`format` is a Terraform format string to be passed to the `format()` function.
`labels` is a list of labels, in order, to pass to `format()` function.
Label values will be normalized before being passed to `format()` so they will be

Default is `{}` (`descriptors` output will be empty).
permission-sets.name: descriptor_formats

permission-sets.description: Set to false to prevent the module from creating any resources
permission-sets.name: enabled

permission-sets.description: ID element. Usually used for region e.g. 'uw2', 'us-west-2', OR role 'prod', 'staging', 'dev', 'UAT'
permission-sets.name: environment

permission-sets.description:
ID element. Additional attributes (e.g. `workers` or `cluster`) to add to `id`,

permission-sets.name: label_order

permission-sets.description: ID element _(Rarely used, not included by default)_. A customer identifier, indicating who this instance of a resource is for
permission-sets.name: tenant

permission-sets.description: ID element. Usually used to indicate role, e.g. 'prod', 'staging', 'source', 'build', 'test', 'deploy', 'release'

permission-sets.description:

permission-sets.name: label_value_case

permission-sets.description: Permission sets
permission-sets.name: permission_sets

permission-sets.default:
{
  "additional_tag_map": {},
  "attributes": [],
  "delimiter": null,
  "descriptor_formats": {},
  "enabled": true,
  "environment": null,
  "id_length_limit": null,
  "label_key_case": null,
  "label_order": [],
  "label_value_case": null,
  "labels_as_tags": [
    "unset"

  "name": null,
  "namespace": null,
